title: Mini cable tensioner for orthopedic cable tensioning
abstract: Various embodiments relate to a mini cable tensioner for introducing tension on a cable, the mini cable tensioner including a tensioning tube, a tensioning grip, including a collet opener as an internal structure of the tensioning grip, a tensioning unit, including a collet axially positioned in a cone sheath, a tensioning rod having a proximal end connected to an end stop nut and a distal end connected to the cone sheath, a tensioning nut rotatable on the tensioning rod, an inner spring configured to actuate the collet in a first direction, and an outer spring configured to actuate the tensioning rod in a second direction, the second direction being opposite to the first direction.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: A mini cable tensioner for introducing tension on a cable, the mini cable tensione: comprising: a tensioning tube, a tensioning grip, comprising: a collet opener as an internal structure of the tensioning grip, a tensioning unit, comprising: a collet axially positioned in a cone sheath, a tensioning rod having a proximal end connected to an end stop nut and a distal end connected to the cone sheath, a tensioning nut rotatable on the tensioning rod, an inner spring configured to actuate the collet in a first direction, and an outer spring configured to actuate the tensioning rod in a second direction the second direction being opposite to the first direction. 2. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, further comprising: the tensioning unit further comprising: a guiding cam connected to the cone sheath, 3. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, the cable is configured to pass through the tensioning tube, the tensioning grip, the collet, the tensioning rod and the end-stop nut. 4. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein the collet is configured to radially contract when the inner spring pushes the collet into the cone sheath. 5. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein rotation of the tensioning nut in a clockwise direction towards the distal end increases tension on the cable and rotation in a counter 

 clockwise direction of the tensioning nut towards the proximal end decreases tension on the cable. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein the end stop nut includes a plurality of fixation slots on the proximal end of the end stop nut. The mini cable tensioner of claim I, wherein tensioning stop slots at the distal end of the tensioning nut and the tensioning stop bolts in the tensioning grip interact to stop any axial displacement and rotation of the tensioning nut relative to the tensioning grip and prevent tensile force greater than 600N. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein tensioning is smooth and stepless between 0 and 600N of a cable. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein tensioning is uniaxial without radial deflection of the cable. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1 , wherein the tensioning tube is configured to be straight or curved based on the type of intervention required. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein the tensioning tube is configured to be different lengths based on the type of intervention required. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1 , wherein tensioning tube is configured to be different diameters based on the type of intervention required. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein the tensioning tube is configured to be different materials based on the type of intervention required. 

 The mint cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein the tensioning tube is configured to transmit a torsional moment based on the type of intervention required. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein the tensioning tube is configured to be connected with a distal end of the tensioning grip. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein the tensioning grip is configured to be connected with a distal end of the tensioning unit. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein the tensioning grip is configured to be connected with a proximal end of the tensioning tube. The mini cable tensioner of claim 1, wherein the tensioning unit is configured to be connected with a proximal end of the tensioning grip.
